title: normalize_chromosome_meiosis_events_v1 — promote staging_chromosome_meiosis_events_v0 → chromosome_meiosis_events_v1
description: Validates POST /api/actions when type='normalize_chromosome_meiosis_events'. Reads a previously-captured staging_chromosome_meiosis_events_v0 envelope (by layer_id), maps rows to the canonical column set (per SPEC_crossovers_page.md §3.1), type-coerces, and emits a typed chromosome_meiosis_events_v1 envelope. Lineage preserved via provenance.source_layer_ids. Mirrors the meiosis atlas's normalize_tract_classifications pattern.

source_layer_id.description: layer_id of the staging_chromosome_meiosis_events_v0 envelope to promote.

source_layer_ids.description: Optional alias for multi-source converters; single-source actions use source_layer_id.

column_map.description: Maps source column names (as they appear in the staging payload's rows) to canonical chromosome_meiosis_events_v1 names. Defaults are the identity (column names already canonical) — only override if your producer uses different names.
